title: ornithidium parviflorum
intro: Ornithidium parviflorum, also known as the Small-flowered Orchid, is a type of flowering plant species in the Orchidaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Ornithidium parviflorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
